text:
I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. In the first image, the glass doors and clean, modern interior suggest a place dedicated to innovation or learning, though it feels impersonal and sterile. The fire safety equipment reminds me of the ever-present precautions we take in life.

In the second image, the wall bursting with color and the 'R+D' sign triggers excitement within me. Here, research and development—efforts to push boundaries—are celebrated. The lively display, with screens and text, draws me in, making me eager to engage with the ideas presented. I feel inspired by the environment’s encouragement of creativity and exploration.
